'''hatuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jigget|jigget]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-t-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jigget|jigget]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hatuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hætihith|hætihith]] || [[word:hætihij|hætihij]] || [[word:hætihish|hætihish]] || [[word:hætihi|hætihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hatutuhuth|hatutuhuth]] || [[word:hatutuhuj|hatutuhuj]] || [[word:hatutuhush|hatutuhush]] || [[word:hatutuhu|hatutuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hatuhuth|hatuhuth]] || [[word:hatuhuj|hatuhuj]] || [[word:hatuhush|hatuhush]] || [[word:hatuhu|hatuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hatufhuth|hatufhuth]] || [[word:hatufhuj|hatufhuj]] || [[word:hatufhush|hatufhush]] || [[word:hatufhuf|hatufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hatuhuthu|hatuhuthu]] || [[word:hatuhuju|hatuhuju]] || [[word:hatuhushu|hatuhushu]] || [[word:hatuhuku|hatuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hatuhuth|hatuhuth]] || [[word:hatuhuj|hatuhuj]] || [[word:hatuhush|hatuhush]] || [[word:hatuhu|hatuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hatuhuthul|hatuhuthul]] || [[word:hatuhujul|hatuhujul]] || [[word:hatuhushul|hatuhushul]] || [[word:hatuhukul|hatuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hatuhuthuthu|hatuhuthuthu]] || [[word:hatuhujuju|hatuhujuju]] || [[word:hatuhushushu|hatuhushushu]] || [[word:hatuhuku|hatuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hatuhuthun|hatuhuthun]] || [[word:hatuhujun|hatuhujun]] || [[word:hatuhushun|hatuhushun]] || [[word:hatuhukun|hatuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hatuhuthuoro|hatuhuthuoro]] || [[word:hatuhujuoro|hatuhujuoro]] || [[word:hatuhushuoro|hatuhushuoro]] || [[word:hatuhukuoro|hatuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
